examples: So McGrady went through his now familiar pregame workout.
That was how many O'Neal played, but that didn't count his pregame dance, another big hit.
In his pregame address, Obama, wearing abrown leather bomber jacket, seemed struck by the surroundings.
Ankiel settled on Niese's glove after borrowing from reliever Scott Rice for pregame warmups.
Lupul practiced on Sunday and participated in Monday's pregame skate, but didn't take the warmup.
